channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE officers face criminal probe for alleged 'untruthful statements' under oath about Minneapolis shooting
item.description: Two ICE officers face a criminal investigation after allegedly making "untruthful statement" under oath about a Minneapolis shooting involving Venezue...

item.title: Fetterman slams Democrats' 'Jim Crow 2.0' voter ID rhetoric as party unity fractures
item.description: Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., breaks with Senate Democrats on voter ID legislation, rejecting the "Jim Crow 2.0" characterization of the SAVE Act.

item.title: Trump War Dept's 39th Attack: 3 Dead in Anti-Drug Smuggling Op in Caribbean Sea
With CALDOGE's Exposure of Newsom's Cannabis Fraud, Steve Hilton Could Sail Right Into Governorship
Collins boosts Republican voter ID effort, but won’t scrap filibuster
item.description: While Sen. Susan Collins, R-Maine, supports the SAVE America Act, she won't buck the Senate filibuster, which will prove a key barrier in the legislat...

item.title: 'Means and Motive': Frog Poison Now Tied to Putin Foe Navalny's Demise
New: Nuclear Deal With Iran Reported As 'Difficult to Impossible' by U.S. Negotiators
Conservative firebrand launches ‘TruckSafe Tipline’ to report illegal drivers amid spike in highway deaths
item.description: Amid heightened concern over highway deaths involving illegal drivers, Sen. Jim Banks, R-Ind., is launching a “TruckSafe Tipline" for truckers to shar...

item.title: Trump trounces Biden energy records in just months as admin celebrates 1 year of 'historic gains': data
item.description: White House marks National Energy Dominance Council anniversary with Interior Secretary Doug Burgum touting energy production gains and lower gas pric...

item.title: UPDATE: Guthrie Case Escalates, Multiple Detained After Operation; No Arrests Made
